description: Botbox webview<->backend trust boundary (KTD8 / R18). This file is the permission allowlist: only the commands enumerated here are reachable from the webview. Every later unit that adds a backend command MUST add its `app:allow-*` permission here, or the command stays unreachable by design. App-defined commands reach the webview via `core:default`; only *plugin* commands need a scope entry. U6 grants the ONLY plugin scope in the app: the `opener` plugin's `open_url`, narrowly scoped to the loopback dashboard URLs so it can open `http://127.0.0.1:<port>` / `http://localhost:<port>` and nothing else.
